enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Dhagudu Dhattham?

The song Dhagudu Dhattham conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters in Manmadhan Ambu.

What is the plot context of the movie Manmadhan Ambu?

Manmadhan Ambu revolves around love, relationships, and the comedic situations that arise from them, with this song highlighting the fun aspects of the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Kamal Haasan and the music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was Dhagudu Dhattham released?

Dhagudu Dhattham was released on November 25, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Dhagudu Dhattham, Kamal Haasan delivers a lively performance that encapsulates the joyous essence of the film Manmadhan Ambu. The song's upbeat tempo and playful lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it perfect for festive occasions. It showcases the carefree attitude of the characters, inviting listeners to join in the fun. Overall, the track is a delightful blend of catchy music and engaging lyrics that resonate with audiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Dhagudu Dhattham from Manmadhan Ambu is a vibrant celebration of life, showcasing Kamal Haasan's unique flair as both singer and lyricist. With Devi Sri Prasad's energetic composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the infectious rhythm and joyful vibes that make this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: I feel like leaving, but I can't. I search for a way to go, but I can't find it.
When the day comes to an end, it feels like a cycle. Say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham.

Oh, the one who eats sweets, you are doing charity. The one who eats sweets, you are pretending to be something else in the car. A wrong person will always win. There is no time for this. Knowledge will prevail.
When the day comes to an end, it feels like a cycle. Say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham.
I feel like leaving, but I can't. I search for a way to go, but I can't find it.
Hey.. Who can say who is good? Who can say who is bad? Is the good one bad or the bad one good? Life is like an automatic watch, it keeps running. The anxious one stops and thinks.
Oh my friend, life is like the final exam of the year. Listen to the new song. Your eyes are like a trap, they will catch you.
When the day comes to an end, it feels like a cycle. Say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham.
Oh.. The one who is mischievous, if you act like a child, you will get money. If you act like a fool, you will lose your sight. The one who is truthful will search for the truth.
Listen... You are the one who brings others together. You are the one who has a different heart. You have hidden your feelings in another heart.
When the day comes to an end, it feels like a cycle. Say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham, say Dhagudu Dhattham.
Even if you work hard, you will only earn a little money. Even if you think a lot, you will still end up with nothing.
